examples: I know a great shortcut to get our mirror ribosome!
The ribosome research, the academy said, is being used to develop new antibiotics.
Just type the Protein DataBank ID number for the ribosome that you want to look at, and then start exploring.
From a medicinal standpoint, the ribosome is important because it is what antibiotics target.
The ribosome reads the code and assembles long polymer chains out of amino acids.
